title: asplenium myriophyllum var. myriophyllum
intro: Asplenium myriophyllum var. myriophyllum, also known as the Many-leaved spleenwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The Many-leaved spleenwort is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
